# AlphaFi Docs

## AlphaFi Docs

- [What is AlphaFi](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/introduction/what-is-alphafi.md): The Premium Smart Yield Aggregator on SUI
- [How It Works](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/introduction/how-it-works.md)
- [Roadmap](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/introduction/roadmap.md)
- [Yield Farming Pools](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/strategies/yield-farming-pools.md): Auto compounding, Auto rebalancing concentrated liquidity pools
- [Tokenomics](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alpha-token/tokenomics.md): Max supply: 10,000,000 ALPHA tokens.
- [ALPHA Airdrops](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alpha-token/alpha-airdrops.md)
- [stSUI](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphafi-stsui-standard/stsui.md)
- [stSUI Audit](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphafi-stsui-standard/stsui-audit.md)
- [stSUI Integration](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphafi-stsui-standard/stsui-integration.md)
- [Bringing Assets to AlphaFi](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/getting-started/bringing-assets-to-alphafi.md): Bridging assets from other blockchains
- [Supported Assets](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/getting-started/bringing-assets-to-alphafi/supported-assets.md)
- [Community Links](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/info/community-links.md)
- [Introduction](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphalend/introduction.md)
- [What is AlphaLend?](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphalend/introduction/what-is-alphalend.md)
- [How it works](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphalend/introduction/how-it-works.md)
- [Concepts](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphalend/introduction/concepts.md)
- [Security](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphalend/security.md)
- [Audit Report](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphalend/security/audit-report.md)
- [Risks](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphalend/security/risks.md)
- [Liquidation](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphalend/security/liquidation.md)
- [Developers](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphalend/developers.md)
- [Contract & Object IDs](https://docs.alphafi.xyz/alphalend/developers/contract-and-object-ids.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.alphafi.xyz/introduction/what-is-alphafi.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
